ddls:
CREATE TABLE "qa_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality control event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality control event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the event was last updated */,
  "display_key" TEXT /* Display key for the event */,
  "is_holdable" INTEGER /* Whether the event is holdable or not */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the event was created */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qa_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Default severity level for this type of event */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Expected time to resolve this type of event (in hours) */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Whether this type of event is critical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the rule applies to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the rule */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_rules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES qa_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the task is related to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the task was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tasks_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES qa_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the technician (e.g., lab technician, quality assurance) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the technician belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the log entry is related to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was made */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES qa_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the alert is related to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_alerts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES qa_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES qa_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
